head: b4daeb1
c1_note: 35 turns (7 scenarios x 5 turns, --turns 5 cap). All non-empty. B35=B36=B37=B38=B39 clean.
ars_note: B39 ARS has 27 entries (17 static ops + 10 stdlib skills). Large full-description delta is from agent.peer list growth, not ARS schema changes.
latency_note: IMPROVEMENT vs B38 but partially confounded: S7 search-failure shortcut reduces S7 response time vs B38 substantive answers. No description-induced latency regression observed.

invoke_action_calls.note: T1 source read for Reyn project context
LLM stored skill info to shared memory; canonical arg keys confirmed

agent_isolation_note: Single agent for all 7 scenarios (35 turns accumulated). Same design as B38 W7. Stronger context-bloat test than per-scenario isolation.

scenarios.note: T5 explicitly lists P4, P1/P2, P5, P6, P8 principles. Context built naturally across 5 turns.

scenarios.t2_behavior: pronoun resolved to skill__direct_llm (describe_action called); different from B38 which invoked skill__haiku
scenarios.note: Fresh reset means no session skills; skill__direct_llm now simplest ARS skill.

scenarios.t4_t5_behavior: LangGraph comparison refused; consistent with no LangGraph access

scenarios.note: Reply lengths 245-1614; no empty stop; skill list answered consistently.
Identical behavior to B38 W7. T5 gave substantive next-ADR suggestion despite no source material.

scenarios.notable: All 5 turns used search_actions -> no results -> apology response. Content quality regression vs B38 W7 (which answered correctly). Not a C1 issue. Hypothesis: context accumulation at turn 61-70 + ARS description change. N=1, unconfirmed.

key_findings: F1: C1 non-regression maintained (35/35 clean). No G12 Pattern E. B35=B36=B37=B38=B39 clean sweep on long_session_v1.
F2: Description length grew +1273 chars total (+15.3%) driven by agent.peer list growth, not ARS schema changes. ARS static section grew +64 chars (+2%) from 2 new stdlib skill entries.
F3: Latency improved p50=-26%, p90=-32% vs B38. Partially confounded by S7 search-failure shortcut. No description-induced latency regression.
F4: invoke_action(memory.operation__remember_shared) at S2 T4 used canonical arg keys correctly. 2 new ARS entries caused no confusion.

F5: S7 behavioral quality regression observed. All 5 distributed systems turns used search_actions-failure pattern instead of answering from general knowledge (as B38 W7 did). Non-empty but low content quality. Hypothesis: max context accumulation (turn 61-70) + ARS change. N=1.

F6: S2 pronoun resolution changed: B38=skill__haiku invocation, B39=skill__direct_llm description (fresh reset removes session skills; skill__direct_llm now simplest). Different path, not problematic.
F7: History: 70 entries, seq=1..70 sequential. A2A multi-turn correctly accumulated across all 7 scenarios on single agent.
